parameters.query:
SELECT username, teacher_pass, school_id, teacher_id 
  FROM school.teachers
  WHERE LOWER(username) = LOWER($1)
  AND teacher_pass = $2
  LIMIT 1;

SELECT *
FROM school.teachers
WHERE teacher_id = $1 ;

UPDATE school.teachers
SET teacher_login_date = '{{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}',
  teacher_login_time = '{{ $now.format('HH:mm') }}'
WHERE teacher_id = $2 ;

SELECT DISTINCT session_name AS option
FROM school.sessions
WHERE school_id = '{{ $('Logged School').item.json.school_id }}'
ORDER BY session_name ASC;

SELECT DISTINCT student_class AS option
FROM school.class
WHERE school_id = '{{ $('Logged School').item.json.school_id }}'
ORDER BY student_class DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT student_class, student_course AS option
FROM school.class
WHERE school_id = '{{ $('Logged School').item.json.school_id }}'
ORDER BY student_class DESC;

SELECT 
  v.student_id,
  l.monthly_fee, l.total_due, l.total_paid, l.total_balance, 
  l.due_tilldate, l.bal_tilldate,
  v.m01, v.m02, v.m03, v.m04, v.m05, v.m06, 
  v.m07, v.m08, v.m09, v.m10, v.m11, v.m12,
  v.m13, v.m14, v.m15, v.m16, v.m17, v.m18, 
  v.m19, v.m20, v.m21, v.m22, v.m23, v.m24
  
FROM school.fee_ledger l
INNER JOIN school.fee_ledger_view v ON l.student_id = v.student_id
WHERE l.student_id = '{{ $json.student_id }}';

SELECT student_id, student_reg, session_name, student_class, student_course, student_name, guardian_name, session_name, session_from, session_to, student_status
FROM school.students
WHERE 
  student_id = '{{ $json.student_id }}'
  AND school_id = '{{$('Logged School').item.json.school_id}}'
ORDER BY student_id ASC;

SELECT 
  v.student_id,
  l.monthly_fee, l.total_due, l.total_paid, l.total_balance, 
  l.due_tilldate, l.bal_tilldate,
  v.m01, v.m02, v.m03, v.m04, v.m05, v.m06, 
  v.m07, v.m08, v.m09, v.m10, v.m11, v.m12,
  v.m13, v.m14, v.m15, v.m16, v.m17, v.m18, 
  v.m19, v.m20, v.m21, v.m22, v.m23, v.m24
  
FROM school.fee_ledger l
INNER JOIN school.fee_ledger_view v ON l.student_id = v.student_id
WHERE l.student_id = '{{ $json.student_id }}';

SELECT student_id, student_reg, session_name, student_class, student_course, student_name, guardian_name, session_name, session_from, session_to, student_status
FROM school.students
WHERE 
  student_id = '{{ $json.student_id }}'
  AND school_id = '{{$('Logged School').item.json.school_id}}'
ORDER BY student_id ASC;

SELECT student_id, student_reg, session_name, student_class, student_course, student_status, student_name
FROM school.students
WHERE 
  session_name = $1
  AND school_id = $2
ORDER BY student_id ASC;

SELECT student_id, student_reg, session_name, student_class, student_course, student_status, student_name
FROM school.students
WHERE 
  session_name = '{{ $('Download Fee Record').item.json['Session :'] }}'
  AND school_id = '{{$('Logged School').item.json.school_id}}'
ORDER BY student_id ASC;

-- Update monthly fee record of students
UPDATE school.fee_months fm
SET paid_amount = v.amount
FROM
(
SELECT
fl.ledger_id,
s.session_from,
m.month_index,
m.amount
FROM school.temp_fee_upload t
JOIN school.students s
ON s.student_reg = t.student_reg
JOIN school.fee_ledger fl
ON fl.student_id = s.student_id
CROSS JOIN LATERAL
(
VALUES
(1,t.M01),(2,t.M02),(3,t.M03),(4,t.M04),
(5,t.M05),(6,t.M06),(7,t.M07),(8,t.M08),
(9,t.M09),(10,t.M10),(11,t.M11),(12,t.M12),
(13,t.M13),(14,t.M14),(15,t.M15),(16,t.M16),
(17,t.M17),(18,t.M18),(19,t.M19),(20,t.M20),
(21,t.M21),(22,t.M22),(23,t.M23),(24,t.M24)
) AS m(month_index, amount)
) v
WHERE fm.ledger_id = v.ledger_id
AND fm.fee_month =
date_trunc('month', v.session_from) + (v.month_index-1) * interval '1 month';

-- Upate fee Ledger for totals
UPDATE school.fee_ledger fl
SET
total_due =
(
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(due_amount),0)
FROM school.fee_months fm
WHERE fm.ledger_id = fl.ledger_id
),
total_paid =
(
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(paid_amount),0)
FROM school.fee_months fm
WHERE fm.ledger_id = fl.ledger_id
),
total_balance =
(
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(due_amount - paid_amount),0)
FROM school.fee_months fm
WHERE fm.ledger_id = fl.ledger_id
),
due_tilldate =
(
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(due_amount),0)
FROM school.fee_months fm
WHERE fm.ledger_id = fl.ledger_id
AND fm.fee_month <= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)
),
bal_tilldate =
(
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(due_amount - paid_amount),0)
FROM school.fee_months fm
WHERE fm.ledger_id = fl.ledger_id
AND fm.fee_month <= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)
)
WHERE fl.student_id IN
(
SELECT s.student_id
FROM school.students s
JOIN school.temp_fee_upload t
ON s.student_reg = t.student_reg
);
UPDATE school.students s
SET student_status =
CASE
WHEN fl.bal_tilldate > 0
THEN 'Fee Defaulter'
ELSE 'Active'
END
FROM school.fee_ledger fl
WHERE s.student_id = fl.student_id
AND s.student_reg IN
(
SELECT student_reg
FROM school.temp_fee_upload
)
AND s.student_status <> 'Left';

--DROP TABLE school.temp_fee_upload;
TRUNCATE school.temp_fee_upload;

student_reg, m01, m02, m03, m04, m05, m06, m07, m08, m09, m10, m11, m12, m13, m14, m15, m16, m17, m18, m19, m20, m21, m22, m23, m24
)

);

UPDATE school.temp_fee_upload t
SET student_id = s.student_id
FROM school.students s
WHERE s.student_reg = t.student_reg;

SELECT 
  v.student_id,
  COALESCE(l.monthly_fee::text, '-') AS monthly_fee,
  COALESCE(l.total_due::text, '-') AS total_due,
  COALESCE(l.total_paid::text, '-') AS total_paid,
  COALESCE(l.total_balance::text, '-') AS total_balance,
  COALESCE(l.due_tilldate::text, '-') AS due_tilldate,
  COALESCE(l.bal_tilldate::text, '-') AS bal_tilldate,

  COALESCE(v.m01::text, '-') AS m01,
  COALESCE(v.m02::text, '-') AS m02,
  COALESCE(v.m03::text, '-') AS m03,
  COALESCE(v.m04::text, '-') AS m04,
  COALESCE(v.m05::text, '-') AS m05,
  COALESCE(v.m06::text, '-') AS m06,

  COALESCE(v.m22::text, '-') AS m22,

  COALESCE(v.m24::text, '-') AS m24
  
FROM school.fee_ledger l
INNER JOIN school.fee_ledger_view v 
  ON l.student_id = v.student_id;

SELECT student_id, student_reg, session_name, student_class, student_course, student_name, guardian_name, relation_w_guardian, guardian_email, session_name, session_from, session_to, student_status
FROM school.students
WHERE 
  student_status = 'Fee Defaulter'
  AND school_id = '{{$('Logged School').item.json.school_id}}'
ORDER BY student_reg ASC, session_from ASC;

SELECT student_reg, session_name, student_class, student_course, student_name, guardian_name, student_status

SELECT DISTINCT session_name AS option

ORDER BY session_name ASC;

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO school.teachers
(
  teacher_id,
  school_id,
  username,
  teacher_reg,
  teacher_name,
  teacher_email,
  teacher_gender,
  teacher_doe,
  teacher_contact,
  teacher_pass,
  created_by,
  role
)
VALUES
(
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(teacher_id), 0) + 1 FROM school.teachers),
  $1,
  $2,
  $3,
  $4,
  $5,
  $6,
  $7::date,
  $8,
  $9,
  $10,
  $11
);

SELECT LOWER(username)
FROM school.teachers
WHERE school_id = '{{ $('Logged School').item.json.school_id }}'
  AND username = $1;

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO school.students
(
    student_id,
    school_id,
    student_reg,
    student_class,
    student_name,
    student_gender,
    student_course,
    session_name,
    session_from,
    session_to,
    student_status,
    student_dob,
    student_contact,
    student_email,
    relation_w_guardian,
    guardian_name,
    guardian_email,
    guardian_contact,
    student_address,
    student_monthly_fee,
    student_update_by,
    student_update_on,
    created_by,
    class_id,
    session_id
)
VALUES (
    (SELECT MAX(student_id)+1 FROM school.students),
    $1,
    $2,
    $3,
    $4,
    $5,
    $6,
    $7,
    (SELECT session_from FROM school.sessions WHERE school_id = $1 AND session_name = $7),
    (SELECT session_to FROM school.sessions WHERE school_id = $1 AND session_name = $7),
    $8,
    $9::date,
    $10,
    $11,
    $12,
    $13,
    $14,
    $15,
    $16,
    $17,
    $18,
    NOW(),
    $18,
    (SELECT class_id FROM school.class WHERE school_id = $1 AND student_class = $3 AND student_course = $6),
    (SELECT session_id FROM school.sessions WHERE school_id = $1 AND session_name = $7)
);
